description: This file defines the AuthProvider React component and related hooks for managing application-wide authentication state, including user fetching, sign-out, and context management.

methods.name: safeFetchMe
methods.description: Fetches current user info and assigns a role, ensuring runtime safety by coercing unknown roles to 'student'.

methods.name: AuthProvider
methods.description: Provides authentication state context to child components, loads user info, manages sign-out.

methods.name: useAuth
methods.description: Custom hook to access authentication context.
